notes: Benchmark frozen after the first tuned XTTS local result.
Prompts cover short reaction, neutral declarative, question, punchline pause, rambling, interruption, emphasis, calm delivery, host intro, counting/list rhythm, and clause-heavy delivery.

prompts.text: The meeting starts in ten minutes, and everyone is already waiting.
Do you really think that's the best idea?
I had a plan... right up until the elevator opened.
I was going to explain the whole thing, but then I remembered the machine was still running, and honestly that changed the mood.
No, wait, that's not exactly what I meant.
You have got to be kidding me.
It's fine. We can deal with it tomorrow.
Good evening, and welcome back to the strangest little contest in town.
One, two, three, that's already too many problems.
If you keep staring at it long enough, the whole thing begins to feel less like a mistake and more like a decision.
